title: Equivalence Results
description: Output of Stage 4.5 (Equivalence Gate). Generic format: each key is a test name mapping to {passed, fatal, output}. If no equivalence commands are configured, the file contains {skipped: true}.

skipped.description: Set to true when no equivalence commands are configured in the manifest.

fatal.description: If true, failure of this test halts the pipeline.

output.description: Truncated stdout+stderr from the test command.
